# KernelModule

Load and persist kernel modules.

## Summary

- kind: `KernelModule`
- visibility: `public`
- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/kernel-module.schema.json`
- category: `system`

## When To Use

Use this for modules that must be present before networking or container runtime setup.

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-kernelmodule
kind: KernelModule
spec:
    name: example
```

## Realistic Example

```yaml
kind: KernelModule
spec:
  name: br_netfilter
  load: true
  persist: true
  persistFile: /etc/modules-load.d/k8s.conf
```
